title: Accumulate — build up one value
objectives: Recognize a state binding updated from its prior value and the iterator
Map the loop frame to the code that walks a collection
Predict the running total after each step

blocks.content: Sometimes a loop builds one answer by folding each item into a running total. That pattern is ACCUMULATE.
Canonical example: `calculate_total` from fixtures/accumulate. The state cell `total` starts at 0 and grows as `price` arrives.

checks.prompt: Which line initializes the running total?
